examples: Ebola is not as easily spread as viruses such as smallpox.
He gave money to the World Health Organization to help defeat smallpox.
If smallpox occurred in your community, about 30 percent of the people that acquire the disease would die from it.
In theory measles could be eradicated - like smallpox it has no animal host.
There is a new way to make smallpox vaccine that is fast and cheap.
